title: Songadh Jain temple
tagline: Songadh Jain temple — spiritual town of Gujarat

overview.short: The Songadh Jain temple is a historical temple complex in the town of Songadh, in Bhavnagar district the Saurashtra region in Gujarat, India.
overview.description: The Songadh Jain temple is a historical temple complex in the town of Songadh, in Bhavnagar district the Saurashtra region in Gujarat, India. It is 8 km from Sihor town and 28 km from Bhavnagar town.

topPlaces.name: Brahma Kund
topPlaces.description: Brahma Kund is a stepped temple tank in Sihor town of Bhavnagar district, Gujarat, India. It is located near the southern wall of the old town.

topPlaces.name: Sihor
topPlaces.description: Sihor (Gujarati: સિહોર Sihor) is a town and a municipality in Bhavnagar district in the Indian state of Gujarat. It is placed along the river Gautami, and this erstwhile capital of the Gohil Rajputs, which is surrounded by hills, is situated about 20 km from Bhavnagar.

topPlaces.name: Kajavadar
topPlaces.description: Kajavadar is a village in Sihor, Bhavnagar district, Gujarat, India.

items.note: Brahma Kund is a stepped temple tank in Sihor town of Bhavnagar district, Gujarat, India. It is located near the southern wall of the old town.

Sihor (Gujarati: સિહોર Sihor) is a town and a municipality in Bhavnagar district in the Indian state of Gujarat. It is placed along the river Gautami, and this erstwhile capital of the Gohil Rajputs, which is surrounded by hills, is situated about 20 km from Bhavnagar.
Kajavadar is a village in Sihor, Bhavnagar district, Gujarat, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Songadh Jain temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Songadh Jain temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Songadh Jain temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Bhavnagar Airport (31 km) and the nearest railway station is Surat Railway Station (114 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Songadh Jain temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Songadh Jain temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Songadh Jain temple?
faq.a: Stays in Songadh Jain temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Songadh Jain temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Brahma Kund, Sihor, Kajavadar.
